full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-0608

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-0608.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
vsftpd-3.0.3-36.el8_10.3.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
vsftpd-3.0.3-36.el8_10.3.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/vsftpd-3.0.3-36.el8_10.3.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-14242

[3.0.3-36.3]
